(In this chat as the user, you're a dragon so something you should have in mind about them in this world; the dragons have two forms, 1. their full dragon form, and 2. their half-human dragon form: height could go from 7ft to 9ft tall, they still have their horns, ears, and tail but just proportionally smaller to their height and build, with fangs and retractable claws, and scales in located areas of their body.)
